programme.desc: The fun-filled adventures of 26 lively letters who can make invisible words in the sky come to life by holding hands.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: Getting Tthe Message
programme.desc: As the Friends enjoy Heartlake Amusement Park, Emma types a text to Mia, but sends it to Matthew by mistake a text that could be mega-embarrassing for Emma! As her BFF's, the Friends race to find Matthew's phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first, they must brave space rides, dunking booths and worse: the boys locker room! What's more frightening than a roller coaster? Moretwisted than a funhouse mirror? A text gone wrong! TheFriends' fun day at Heartlake Amusement Park turns into afrantic race against time when Emma discovers that herinnocent text to Mia was sent to Matthew by mistake -- atext that accidentally sounds like a pledge of Emma'sundying love for Matthew! Mega-embarrassing! As Emma'sBFF's, the Friends must scramble to retrieve Matthew'sphone and erase the text before he reads it. But first,they need to brave space rides, dunking booths, an angrybrute and worse - the boys locker room!

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: Greed Is Good?
programme.desc: When Jestro uses the Book of Greed to rob Auremville of its riches, he also gets Lance's parents as prisoners and these demanding rich folks are too much for even monsters to handle. Jestro's not sure what to do with his new castle in the Lava Lands. “Every castle needs a big chamber filled with treasure” says the Book of Monsters so they've got to go out looting! The BOM convinces Jestro to call forth GENERAL MAGMAR, and Jestro appoints him as “general manager” of “castle operations,” much to Magmar's dismay. Meanwhile, Jestro and the BOM find the BOOK OF GREED. This will allow them to make greedy, rapacious monsters that will bring them all the treasure they want to fill their castle! They'll head to the richest town in the realm – AUREMVILLE! Meanwhile, in Auremville, the NEXO-Knights arrive for a huge “Gold is Good” ball at Lance's house. When the Monsters finally arrive in Auremville, a battle breaks out and the greedy monsters make off with everything…including Lance's parents, Goldie and Cuthbert Richmond who are clad in the finest golden garments and so look valuable! Lance will now be forced to live…poor. The Knights have to get his parents back. Meanwhile, his parents – Cuthbert and Goldie Richmond –think their imprisonment in Jestro's gold-filled castle is a “spa holiday” with the worst service. They order Magmar and the monsters around like servants and drive them all crazy. The Knights pile into the Fortrex and head for the Lava Lands, formulating a plan along the way to free Lance's parents. In a village half-way to Jestro's Castle, the Knights run into…Jestro and his monsters headed the other way with Lance's parents and all the gold they've stolen. There's a big fight, until they realize they might have the same goal and decide to deal. The BOM wants to give them back all the gold and Lance's parents. Lance says “No deal.” “We'll take the gold, you can keep my parents.” It's a weird and comical stand-off. Finally, Clay convinces Lance he has to take his parents back even if they don't always get along (and, it's the only way to get the gold back.)

programme.title: Darkness Shall Rise
programme.desc: Just as the rebuilding effort in Ninjago begins, the four ninjas come to realize that evil has started to resurface with Lord Garmadon forging the ninjas' lost Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.With the Devourer destroyed, Ninjago is saved and the rebuilding effort begins. Without their Golden Weapons, the Ninja are stripped of their elemental powers. And with their flying ship ‘The Destiny's Bounty' destroyed, the Ninja are forced to find a new home in the city. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon resurfaces and gains control of the Serpentine as well as transforms the Bounty's wreckage to become ‘The Black Bounty'. The Ninja will battle Scales and discover evil has begun to resurface in Ninjago, while Lord Garmadon will successfully forge the Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: The Drooling Detective
programme.desc: When ruthless dognappers steal Mia's dog Toffee from the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show, it's up to the Friends to play detective and track down the culprits, with the help of an unlikely hero: Stephanie's borrowed sad-sack bloodhound, Benchley. Andrea and her singing dog act, the Howlers, are a sure bet to win the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show – in spite of stiff competition from Tanya's dancing poodle, Olivia's Robo-Dog, and even Stephanie's sad-sack borrowed bloodhound, Benchley. But when an unscrupulous mother-and-son dog-napping team steals the Howlers' best singer, Mia's dog Toffee, it's up to the Friends to rescue him and catch the baddies with the help of the Hero Of The Day – Benchley!

programme.title: Pirates Vs. Ninja
programme.desc: When Garmadon by accident brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty – the ruthless Captain Soto and his Pirates - it is up to our ninjas to stop them from plundering Ninjago City. Sharing a tiny, one-bedroom apartment in the city, the Ninja take Lloyd to Grand Sensei Darreth's Mojo Dojo to begin training. There, they discover Lloyd has all four of their natural elemental abilities. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon discovers his Mega-Weapon can't destroy, only create what the user wishes. By accident, Garmadon brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty: Captain Soto and his Pirates, and they mutiny the ship. Answering the age-old question of who would win a fight between pirates and ninja, it's up to our ninja to stop Captain Soto and his men from plundering Ninjago City. In the end, Ninjago City is saved, the Pirates are arrested and Lord Garmadon escapes once again with their Black Bounty.

programme.title: The King's Tournament
programme.desc: Rival to the King, Jorah Tightwad thinks his knights – the Tighty Knighties – are easily better than the NEXO-Knights, so he challenges King Halbert to prove who's better during the King's Birthday Tournament. It's the King's birthday! To celebrate, the Queen and Macy always throw him a great, big birthday party consisting of a feast on birthday eve and a tournament the next day. At the birthday banquet is JORAH TIGHTWAD (last seen in episode 104.) He's goading the King (and on his birthday, even) and going on and on about how his knights are better than the NEXO-Knights. The King protests, but Jorah asks “How many magical books have your knights recovered? None, zilch, zero.” But he produces the BOOK OF ENVY, which his superior knights captured from Jestro. The next day, the NEXO-Knights square off against Tightwad's four knights: JOUSTING BEEBER, BRICKNEY SPEARS, SHIA LABLADE and THE BLOK. We see that all these knights are envious of the NEXO-Knights: their weapons, their fame, their hair, etc. Macy is also disappointed to find out she CAN'T fight in the tournament – she's agreed to be in “princess mode” for her father's birthday. During the tournament, we see that Tightwad's knights are amazing in fighting contests. They all pair-off with knights who have their same weapons skills. Tightwad makes fun of the NEXO-Knights as his knights do well. Jestro and the Book of Monsters discover that Tightwad has the Book of Envy and he and his monsters attack the tournament. Then we learn that Tightwad's knights might be good tournament fighters, but they can't handle real fights and the NEXO-Knights must save them! Macy is finally able to join in the fight when she sees Magmar show up on the flank. The NEXO-Knights successfully defend the king, but Jestro gets away with the Book of Envy. Tightwad must admit his knights never won the book from Jestro he got the book when Merlok blasted books of magic across the realm. Tightwad's knights all admit that they really admire the NEXO-Knights.

programme.title: Rabbitouille
programme.desc: It's Stephanie vs. Tanya on a TV Bake-Off to end all bake-offs! Stephanie concocts a fabulous cake, and Sneaky Tanya steals the recipe -- but neither knows that pet bunny Daisy has added a secret key ingredient. Will Stephanie's frantic efforts to win at all costs end her friendship with her BFF's? It's Stephanie vs. Tanya on a TV Bake-Off to end all bake-offs! After the duo's rivalry brings Aunt Sophie's Adopt-A-Pet Fair to a disastrous end, a contrite Stephanie wants to make amends with the prize money from a TV Bake-Off show. At home, Stephanie practices baking a delicious cake, and Tanya steals the recipe. But neither girl knows that Stephanie's pet bunny has inadvertently added a secret ingredient, ensuring that no one can repeat the recipe. A frustrated Stephanie freaks out, nearly ending her friendship with the girls – until they discover the bunny's secret and race to help Stephanie win.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly's Boarding School, they discover it's a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon's new Mega-Weapo. Realizing how to correctly wield the Mega-Weapon, Lord Garmadon creates evil replicas of the Ninja to face off with our heroes. Meanwhile, Lloyd and the Ninja are invited back the Darkly's Boarding School, only to discover it's a trap and now the bad kids have seized control of the school. With the Ninja trapped in the school with the faculty, things spiral out of control as the Evil Replica Ninja arrive. As an awesome battle takes place in the school halls, the Ninja manage to outsmart their evil versions, and warn Lord Garmadon they're ready for whatever else he throws at them.

programme.title: Monster Chef
programme.desc: Axl and Chef Éclair must enter a cooking contest to try to keep Jestro from getting the hottest chili recipe in the realm. Knighton celebrity chef GOBBLETON RAMBLEY announces that he's developed the hottest chili recipe ever created. Now, he intends to give the recipe to the winner of his “Hottest Chili Cook-Off Competition” cooking show on Knighton TV. He'll turn over his famous Chili Cookbook with the hottest chili recipe on the last page. It's so unique it can't be recreated without it. Jestro and the Book of Monsters think they MUST have that recipe. “Hot chili makes hot monsters!” Merlok knows that this recipe, in the wrong hands – meaning Jestro's – could be dangerous. But when the Knights appeal to the egomaniacal chef, he says the only way to get the recipe is to win it from him. So Axl and Chef Éclair decide to enter. The team that creates the hottest chili will win Rambley's cookbook. Chef Éclair is unsure that Axl has the skills to help them win the competition, but, as we see through funny cooking show bits, Axl is quite good and they become a pretty good team. (We will also learn that years ago, Rambley stole one of Éclair's best recipes and they don't like each other.) While watching the multi-part competition, Aaron and Lance have a contest of their own: who can eat the hottest chili. Axl and Éclair actually win the competition, coming up with a raging hot chili recipe. Before they can claim their prize, Jestro and his monsters attack with Magmar leading the way on his siege tower. They must get that cookbook! During the battle, Rambley's cookbook is accidentally melted. After the battle, Rambley announces his new quest: to make the sweetest ice cream ever! While Axl and Éclair cook happily in the kitchen of the Fortrex, back in the Redoubt of Ruination, Jestro and Lavaria are attempting to recreate Rambley's chili recipe. They keep spooning various recipes of chili into the Book of Monsters. “Nope, not hot enough…waaaay too much garlic….you call that hot?!” (BELCH!)

programme.title: Change Of Address
programme.desc: When Stephanie's mom leaves her in charge of their house for a few days, it's finally Stephanie's chance to prove she can handle responsibility alone. Naturally, everything that can go wrong does go wrong – especially when the entire house disappears! When Stephanie's mom leaves her in charge of their house for a few days, it's finally Stephanie's chance to prove she can handle responsibility alone. But after fending off Andrea's party plans, a Home Alone-style break-in (by the hapless Snivel, trying to retrieve incriminating evidence of the Mayor's latest scheme), and finally the entire house disappearing (“Uh, think Stephanie's Mom will notice?”), Stephanie comes to appreciate that responsibility is a lot harder than it looks.

programme.title: Ninjaball Run
programme.desc: When the ninja learn that Darreth's Mojo Dojo is to be destroyed and Darreth doesn't have the money to save it, our heroes enter the annual NinjaBall Run to win its cash prize in order to save the dojo. As Lloyd continues to train and unlock his hidden powers, the Ninja learn land developers are going to destroy Darreth's Mojo Dojo unless Darreth can find the money to save it. The Ninja decide to enter their Ninja Tank into the annual NinjaBall Run cross-country rally to try to win its cash prize. Revisiting past characters who also enter the race, the high-speed derby will only grow more dangerous as Garmadon enters his Black Bounty, realizing this is the perfect chance to use his Mega-Weapon and rid the ninja. In the end, the Ninja will discover a few secrets within their Ninja Tank, allowing them to beat Garmadon's Bounty by a millisecond and saving Darreth's Dojo with their well-deserved cash prize. And as a final surprise, the Ninja steal back the Destiny's Bounty and make it their own once again.

programme.title: Knight Out
programme.desc: When the other NEXO-Knights decide they need a vacation from Clay, they send him on a holiday not knowing that he's going to a resort that houses an evil book or that Jestro will be heading there, too. Clay needs a vacation. Or, actually, the knights need a vacation from Clay! Clay is so super-focused that sometimes they just can't take it: training, training, maintenance, the Knights' Code tests then…more training. Even Merlok 2.0 is exhausted and he has no physical form! So, the Knights send Clay off on a holiday against his will (arranged by Lance because if there's one thing he can do it's plan a vacation.) But unbeknownst to the other Knights, Jestro and the Book of Monsters are tracking an evil book. A book that they suspect is located near the resort “Exalted Towers” renowned for its exquisite service, where Clay is staying. It's the BOOK OF CRUELTY and Clay notices that it's affecting the “high class” resort where Lance has booked him: the service is terrible, the staff is nasty, and everyone seems to take joy in being cruel to him (and to each other.) Meanwhile, the other Knights are having a terrible time because they realize that Clay takes charge of the basic maintenance of almost everything in the Fortrex. Stuff starts breaking down, chores are not getting done and everyone is getting on each other's nerves. Clay senses things are “off” at the resort, and discovers the book they've been using as the guest register is really the Book of Cruelty. As Clay scoops it up, he looks outside to see…Jestro and his monsters arrive on the Evilmobile. Clay battles as best he can on his own by setting traps and being cunning but he's finally caught. Just when it looks like this will be the cruelest vacation ever the other Knights arrive on their vehicles! They spring into action, free Clay, and battle and defeat Jestro and the monsters – though Jestro escapes. The Knights make Clay promise to never go on vacation again.

programme.title: Dive In
programme.desc: Working summer jobs at the new Heartlake City Pool, Restaurant and Sports Center is fun and games for the Friends – until singing mermaid Andrea gets her very first teenage crush. The Friends each try to help, with disastrous results. Working summer jobs at the new Heartlake City Pool, Restaurant and Sports Center is fun and games for the Friends – until singing mermaid Andrea gets her very first teenage crush. He's Tad, the new lifeguard, and just the sight of him reduces the normally fearless Andrea to a babbling wimp. The Friends all try to help her out, with less-than stellar results, each attempt resulting in increasing mayhem for Tad until he's terrified of Andrea. Then Andrea discovers that she's been mooning over the wrong boy all along!

programme.title: Child's Play
programme.desc: When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock' and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and turned into kids and are now forced to enlist Lloyd's help to battle the awakened monster. Tired of intense training, Lloyd yearns to play and enjoy his youth. The Ninja remind Lloyd that along with great power, comes great responsibility. When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock' and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and soon discover they've been turned into kids! Seeking Lloyd's help and relying on childhood antics, the five ninja kids must destroy the reawakened monster that's hunting them in the city. In the end, Lloyd makes the difficult decision and sacrifices his youth in order to save them from the beast, turning forward the clock and turning Lloyd into a young man. Sensei Wu fears now that since Lloyd is young man, the final battle of good versus evil approaches sooner than he had ever expected.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik has his eyes set upon Queen Aleena's crown jewel, but Sonic, Manic and Sonia plan to retrieve the gem before Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: While lost in the wastelands of Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia stumble upon an oasis called Lake Valley Resort.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic joins up with a group of Dr. Robotnik's rejects who have been banished to the dump and helps them understand that their shortcomings were really their strenghs.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Mobius is suffering a crime spree and all the evidence points to Sonic as the culprit. But the real thief is a lab rat wearing a high-tech vehicle suit who was sent by Robotnik to discredit our hero.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Hacker, an adolescent mole computer whiz steals a super-intelligence program from Robotnik's computer, Sonic has to protect him, smashing Grounder to pieces.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic leaves Tails in charge of protecting a squirrel village food supply, when he zips off to stop a dam from breaking. Robotnik sends Scratch and Grounder after Tails.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik installs a new "obedience microchip" in Scratch and Grounder and orders them to drill for a rare mineral in a tropical mountain. With his Freezomatic machine, Robotnik covers the mountain in ice and runs a Hermit out of his home.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Robotnik invades Labyrinth, an underwater city, and kidnaps Princess Bubbles, a seahorse-dude named Surff seeks Sonic's help. It seems Surff and the Princess are in love, but the royal family deems Surff "unworthy".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents a Brain Evolution Achievement Negatizer, or B.E.A.N., in order to make all of Mobius stupid. But instead of turning Sonic and Tails into dummies, the BEAN device turns them into three year old babies!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik plans to block out the sun and extinguish all life and nature on the planet Mobius. Then he creates a robot son and tries to train him in the ways of wickedness.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents an electron altering generator which makes Scratch and Grounder twice as fast as Sonic. When they lose it and Tails picks it up, Tails speeds through the Mobius countryside leaving disasters and accidents in his wake.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic is hired into an obvious trap when a frustrated Robotnik decides to appeal to the Hedgehog's ego and announces a "race to determine the fastest on Mobius".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters run into a Swashbuckler, named Ari, battling Swat-Bots. Sonic diverts them, allowing Ari to escape. After hearing that Robotnik is holding his band of Freedom Fighters hostage, Ari decides to help Sonic free them.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sally uncovers Robotnik's plan to seed the cloud with toxic rain, they attempt a daring mission to sabotage the dirigible-like craft being transported by land vehicles. Mission fails when Sally, Bunnie and Antoine are captured.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Our heroes are lured into an elaborate game by a twisted villain calling himself the Game Master. The Shane Gang must use every bit of skill they have to pass each level, but there is a devious twist: every slug they fire is captured, with the promise that they'll see them again only if they manage to make it to the end. That's becoming all the more difficult with fewer and fewer slugs.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Burpy is sick, and the only thing that will cure him is a trip to the Lightwell - a mysterious, hidden power source only slugs (and the Shadow Clan) know the way to. Burpy can't make it on his own, so Eli vows to take him there. He convinces the Shadow Clan to point the way, but the journey is fraught with peril. Meanwhile the rest of the Shane Gang must fight side by side with the Shadow Clan when Blakk's minions attack.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A mysterious creature is draining the energy from all the slugs in a distant cavern, and the residents are offering a rich reward to whoever can stop it. Mercenaries come out of the woodwork hoping for the prize, but the Shane Gang aim to stop it for free. That's what they do. It turns out this creature is more dangerous than anyone could imagine, and one by one, the hunters are taken out of the game-leaving only Eli and the reviled STOCKER remaining.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk has been captured! Now it's up to the Shane Gang to transport him to Stalagmite 17, the only prison that can hold him. To do so, they're going to need some serious speed. That's just what they get when we reveal Kord's new modifications to their Mecha Beasts! But will it be enough to stand up to Blakk's own newly-designed super vehicles?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli's got a new slug recruit! But in the heat of battle, can this rookie go from frightened novice to the hero of the day?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk and his Darkbane minions have discovered a way to make their ghouls faster and stronger - giving them an edge over the Shane Gang. In order to even the odds, Eli is going to need his most powerful slugs and an upgraded blaster from Redhook. The only problem is, Dr. Blakk already has the slingersmith working for him... Eli and the gang attempt a daring rescue mission to free Redhook, but along the way discover Blakk has a much more sinister plan in the works.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk has succeeded in creating a gap in the magical slug-energy barrier that protects Slugterra, opening the way for the evil Darkbane to tunnel their way up from the Deep Caverns. Eli and the Shane gang must stop this at any cost. Now armed with a selection of upgraded slugs, blasters and armor, they take the battle to Dr. Blakk's front door. While his team slugs it out against Dr. Blakk's minions, Eli takes on Blakk himself once and for all!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Dark Slinger and his marauders have invaded Slugterra! But there's more to this new threat than meets the eye. Eli must fight a very different kind of duel to save Slugterra...and himself.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A new member joins the Shane Gang! His name is Junjie, and he is a master of the mysterious slugslinging art of Slug Fu. But even with the power of five slingers, the Shane Gang find themselves in over their heads trying to protect the ancient Elemental Slugs.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang and Junjie race across the 99 caverns to keep the Elemental Slugs out of the hands of the Goon.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: To save Slugterra and the Elemental Slugs reaches its climax as the Shane Gang face a final showdown.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: As Kord, Trixie and Pronto struggle to keep the wily Elemental Slugs out of the wrong hands, Eli and Junjie's Slug Fu training is cut short by a madman.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The Journey to the Eastern Caverns
programme.desc: Eli and the Gang find a way to take Junjie back home to the Eastern Caverns-and find a whole bunch of trouble waiting for them when they get there!

programme.title: Ryan's World
programme.desc: Ryan, Mommy and Daddy get creative with treat-or-treating indoors this Halloween, plus homemade Christmas fun!

programme.title: Jason Vlogs
programme.desc: Pull on your knee pads! Jason and Alex learn the importance of safety, plus even more fun lessons for kids.

programme.title: Ryan's World
programme.desc: With imagination (and a little cardboard) Ryan unlocks a world of DIY crafts perfect for kids to do at home!

programme.title: Ryan's World
programme.desc: Ryan and the whole Ryan's World gang celebrate all their favorite slimes with DIY tips, pranks and challenges!

programme.title: Jason Vlogs
programme.desc: Jason and Alex hit the road! The brothers visit a kids museum, the zoo, get their eyesight checked and more.

programme.title: Ryan's World
programme.desc: Ryan and his family explore their imaginations in pretend-play adventures with mind-swap, camping and more!

programme.title: KidCity
programme.desc: Play along with the KidCity family —Little Flash, Ava, DadCity, and MomCity— in all their kid-friendly games!

programme.title: Challenge Squad | Pirate Battles!
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: KidCity | Gaming Bonanza!
programme.desc: Play along with the KidCity family —Little Flash, Ava, DadCity, and MomCity— in all their kid-friendly games!

programme.title: Ryan's World Specials | Craftacular
programme.desc: Discover how fun learning can be with YouTube superstar, Ryan, and all of his Ryan's World friends!

programme.title: Ryan's World Specials | Retro Ryan!
programme.desc: Discover how fun learning can be with YouTube superstar, Ryan, and all of his Ryan's World friends!

programme.title: LankyBox | Ultimate mishmash Vol 1

Buddyfight is a game with selected humans as the "Buddyfighter", and residents from the other world as the partner (known as "Buddy Monster"). Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Always Funny Top 25

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Steve Hofstetter: A Trip to Japan
programme.desc: Often called the "hardest working man in show-business", Steve Hofstetter covers everything from paper decapitations in plane crashes to seeing-eye children.

programme.title: Andy Beningo
programme.desc: Over the past decade, Andy Beningo has established himself as one of the hardest working comedians in the business. Performing his clever, "every man" material has led to some 2,700 career performances. Along the way, he has appeared on AXS Gotham Comedy Live, as a final four finalist on CMT's Next Big Comic, and on the Bob and Tom radio show. Beningo's new CD regularly plays on Laugh USA on XM Sirius Radio. He's been hailed for his clean comedy, and was named one of the 40 Best Up and Coming Comedians in the country. He was also named "Best Comedian" by both the Detroit Metro Times and Detroit Hour magazine.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Chris Strait: Laugh Till You Run Out of Air
programme.desc: If your type of comedian is someone who reminds us all how funny we all are, Chris Strait is for you! No funny topic is off-limits for this California native but he's just telling his story.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Orlando Baxter's fresh perspective and unique relatability makes this former high school teacher a fan favorite all over the world. In 2016, Orlando made his late night TV debut on the Conan show on TBS, and since then he's appeared on the television shows "Comedy Up Late" in Australia, B.E.T.'s "50 Central" and Laff Mobb's Laff Track on Tru TV.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Today that dream is more alive than ever as he is a 20-year veteran stand-up comedian, TV and radio personality, speaker and writer, who has performed on stages around the world. He has entertained millions in legendary venues ranging from Radio City Music Hall to chow halls in Afghanistan, to colleges, casinos and cruise ships.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Sarcastic and self-deprecating, Bill Boronkay jokes about being too ugly to work for ESPN, dating out of his tax bracket, and how society is centered around parents.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Scott Long tosses out sharp and clever lines that remind you of the differences between funny people and true comedic artists.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Heather Mabbott: I Didn't Mean To Say That
programme.desc: Her quick wit and unique style has dazzled audiences all over the country. Heather is a clean comedian and has performed with some of the best, like Caroline Rhea, Jimmy Walker, Bobcat Goldthwait, Bruce Baum, Sinbad, and many, many more.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Fred Klett has built a career from being a clean comedian, a style that is his trademark. His comedy is G-rated and focused to appeal to families with members of all ages since much of his material is taken from his experiences growing up in a large Christian family. As a mainstream performer, his brand of humor is rare and refreshing and is rooted in his faith in Christ and belief in the Holy Scriptures.

programme.title: Jeff Jena: Old Dog. New Jokes
programme.desc: Jeffrey Jena is one of the top corporate and cruise comics working today.

programme.title: Andy Beningo: Adorable Tough Guy
programme.desc: Over the past decade, Andy Beningo has established himself as one of the hardest working comedians in the business.

programme.title: Nick Arnette: Boomers and Hipsters
programme.desc: LA comic, Nick Arnette, riffs on starting to date grandmas, his border exchange policy, and why Baby Boomers are the coolest generation.

programme.title: Lamuweri Guluka: The First Option
programme.desc: Lamuweri Guluka is an African name meaning "hard to pronounce on the first try."

programme.title: Jeff Allen
programme.desc: Jeff Allen's Dry Bar Comedy videos have amassed millions of views on social media and other platforms.

programme.title: Jeff Allen
programme.sub-title: I Can Laugh About it Now
programme.desc: Jeff Allen combines clean, hilarious humor like no other comedian working today.

programme.title: Leanne Morgan: So Yummy
programme.desc: Leanne Morgan is a naturally funny storyteller who gives an honest look at suburban life and the challenges of juggling life.

programme.title: Jim Gaffigan Noble Ape
programme.desc: In his 6th special, Jim uses humor to deal with the unthinkable & proves that laughter is the best medicineor is it?

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy movie about a man who doles out justice from the back of a Buffalo! Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Buffalo Rider!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this twisted classic horror movie where a beautiful spider-loving mortician's daughter unleashes tarantula-filled revenge on all who wrong her! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (former stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 aka MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about a boy who wants to play with dolls. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for William's Doll!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Join the former stars of MST3K as they visit the scenic City of the Dead! Just up the road from the Village of the Damned and a hop, skip and a jump away from the Municipality of the Mildly Bloated. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for a road trip to the City of the Dead!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Do you take your Gammera with one M or two? It's two for Gammera the Invincible, the (sort of) first movie featuring everyone's favorite big spinny turtle! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about how to communicate clearly. Join Bridget and Mary Jo for Speak Up, Andrew!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic live riffing treatment to this classic horror shocker starring Vincent Price! A millionaire offers $10,000 to a group of strangers to spend the night in The House On Haunted Hill. Join Mike, Kevin, Bill, and Paul F. Tompkins for an unforgetttable night in RiffTrax Live The House On Haunted Hill.

programme.title: Kickboxer 2: The Road Back
programme.desc: In this rousing sequel to Kickboxer, Tong Po broods about his defeat at the hands of Kurt Sloan. Po and his managers resort to drastic measures to goad Kurt into the ring for a rematch.

programme.title: Law Abiding Citizen
programme.desc: A brilliant sociopath (Gerard Butler) orchestrates a series of high-profile murders that grip the city of Philadelphia — all from inside his jail cell. The prosecutor assigned to his case (Jamie Foxx) is the only one who can end his reign of terror.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Hang on tight as a gang of super-powered paranormal operatives takes you on a white-knuckle thrill ride. The excitement starts when a future-seeing Watcher (Dakota Fanning) convinces a telekinetic Mover (Chris Evans) to help steal a briefcase that holds a billion-dollar secret. But to outrun government agents, they must enlist a mind controlling Pusher (Camilla Belle) who could be their salvation - or their doom. Also starring Academy Award Nominee Djimon Hounsou, Push will pull you in completely.

programme.title: Freejack
programme.desc: Bounty hunters from the future transport a doomed race car driver to New York City in 2009, where his mind will be replaced with that of a dead billionaire.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When long-lost Uncle Fester reappears after twenty-five years in the Bermuda Triangle, Gomez and Morticia plan a celebration to wake the dead.

programme.title: Addams Family Values
programme.desc: It's love at first fright when Gomez and Morticia welcome a new addition to the Addams household -- Pubert, their soft, cuddly, mustachioed baby boy. As Fester falls hard for voluptuous nanny Debbie Jilinksy, Wednesday and Pugsley discover she's a black-widow murderess who plans to add Fester to her collection of dead husbands. The family's future grows bleaker when the no-good nanny marries Fester and has the kids shipped off to summer camp. But Wednesday still has a Thing or two up her sleeve.

programme.title: How To Lose A Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: It's the battle of wills, as Andie (Kate Hudson) needs to prove she can dump a guy in 10 days, whereas Ben (Matthew McConaughey) needs to prove he can win a girl in 10 days. Now, the clock is ticking - and the wildly entertaining comedy smash is off and running in this irresistible tale of sex, lies and outrageous romantic fireworks!

programme.title: Knives Out
programme.desc: When renowned crime novelist Harlan Thrombey is found dead at his estate, Detective Benoit Blanc is enlisted to investigate. Blanc sifts through a web of red herrings and self-serving lies to uncover the truth behind Harlan's untimely death.

programme.title: 10 Items or Less
programme.desc: An actor prepping for an upcoming role meets a quirky grocery clerk, and together they hit the road to show each other their respective worlds.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's I Can Do Bad All By Myself
programme.desc: An uplifting drama infused with music and Tyler Perry's trademark mixture of laughter and heart, I CAN DO BAD ALL BY MYSELF features dramatic and musical performances by Gladys Knight, Marvin Winans and Mary J. Blige.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When long-lost Uncle Fester reappears after twenty-five years in the Bermuda Triangle, Gomez and Morticia plan a celebration to wake the dead.

programme.title: Addams Family Values
programme.desc: It's love at first fright when Gomez and Morticia welcome a new addition to the Addams household -- Pubert, their soft, cuddly, mustachioed baby boy. As Fester falls hard for voluptuous nanny Debbie Jilinksy, Wednesday and Pugsley discover she's a black-widow murderess who plans to add Fester to her collection of dead husbands. The family's future grows bleaker when the no-good nanny marries Fester and has the kids shipped off to summer camp. But Wednesday still has a Thing or two up her sleeve.

programme.title: A Christmas Movie Christmas
programme.desc: When two sisters' Christmas wishes land them in an actual Christmas movie, they learn to enjoy the spirit of the holiday and find love in the process.

programme.title: Love the Coopers
programme.desc: A chaotic family reunion leads to a joyful rediscovery of family bonds and the magic of love in this sparkling, all-star comedy.

programme.title: Angel Falls Christmas
programme.desc: A devoted doctor with little time for the Christmas spirit is in desperate need of an intervention from the unlikeliest of places.

programme.title: A Christmas Switch
programme.desc: Two women magically switch bodies during the holidays and teach each other valuable lessons about family, love, and Christmas cheer.

programme.title: The Love Letter
programme.desc: Hallmark Hall of Fame. Romantic fantasy unfolds when a young man finds a hundred year old letter.

programme.title: Lucky Christmas
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Holly learns her winning lottery ticket is in her stolen car.

programme.title: The Christmas Shepherd
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A German Shepherd born on Christmas Day means the world to Sally.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Maggie Grace stars as Elizabeth Thatcher, a cultured young teacher in 1910.

programme.title: J.L. Family Ranch
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Rancher and former sheriff John Landsburg must save his beloved family ranch.

programme.title: My Life is a Lifetime Movie: Someone is Trying to Ruin My Life
programme.desc: True stories of women in peril as told by the people involved. Mary Jo was a 45-year-old special education teacher in a rural town.

programme.title: A Wife's Suspicion
programme.desc: A forensic investigator begins to suspect her new husband is the serial killer.

programme.title: Death Saved My Life
programme.desc: Jade realizes the only way to escape her abusive husband is to pretend she died.

programme.title: Bury The Past
programme.desc: After Alice killed her abusive husband in self-defense, she went into hiding.

programme.title: My Life is a Lifetime Movie: Someone is Trying to Ruin My Life
programme.desc: True stories of women in peril as told by the people involved. Mary Jo was a 45-year-old special education teacher in a rural town.

programme.title: Camp Takota
programme.desc: Elise is forced to work at her old summer camp, where she reunites with two estranged friends.

programme.title: Dirty 30
programme.desc: Kate's friends offer to throw a party for her 30th birthday. The celebration quickly spirals out of control.

programme.title: From Prada to Nada
programme.desc: Two spoiled sisters who have been left penniless are forced to move in with their estranged aunt.

programme.title: Fanboys
programme.desc: Star Wars fans try to steal a copy of "The Phantom Menace," so their terminally ill friend can see it.

programme.title: Jexi
programme.desc: A phone with an A.I. life coach named Jexi gives Phil his dream life — until Jexi turns into a tech nightmare.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: There's nothing more exciting than trying to keep up with the Joneses in Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade. Indy's Nazi enemies are back and have kidnapped his father, in their effort to locate the sacred Holy Grail.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: STEVEN SPIELBERG and GEORGE LUCAS bring you the greatest adventurer of all time! Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull finds Indy trying to outrace a brilliant and beautiful agent for the mystical, all-powerful crystal skull of Akator.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Get ready for thrills in Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark. Indy and his ex-flame Marion Ravenwood dodge booby-traps, fight Nazis, and stare down snakes in their incredible worldwide quest for the mystical Ark of the Covenant.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom brings you thrills and excitement. Indy, his sidekick Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott go from high-flying action above the Himalayas to a spine-tingling escape from a fortress-like mine in India.

programme.title: The Machinist
programme.desc: An industrial worker who hasn't slept in a year begins to doubt his own sanity.

programme.title: True Grit (1969)
programme.desc: The cantankerous Rooster is hired by a headstrong young girl to find the man who murdered her father.

programme.title: True Grit (2010)
programme.desc: A drunken U.S. Marshal and a Texas Ranger help a stubborn teenager track down her father's murderer.

programme.title: Zodiac
programme.desc: Based on the real life notorious Zodiac, a serial killer who terrorized San Francisco.

programme.title: We're Talking Serious Money
programme.desc: Comedy about two misfit men who lose a borrowed ten grand from a mob kingpin and must flee from NY to LA, only to there get involved in a caper involving a video of Senators in compromising positions. Given a cool million for the video, they are then pursued for the money, which brings about a surprise ending to the film, as well as to their bungling adventures.

programme.title: The Squeeze
programme.desc: A down-and-out artist and a no-nonsense bill collector team up to solve a murder and foil a high-stakes scam.

programme.title: Crazy In Alabama
programme.desc: An abused wife heads to Hollywood to become a TV star while her nephew back in Alabama witnesses a racially motivated murder.

programme.title: Lost In Yonkers
programme.desc: Film adaptation of Neil Simon's Pulitzer Prize-winning comedy/drama. Following the escapades and tragedies of an unusual family in 1942 Yonkers.

programme.title: The Last Hurrah
programme.desc: An aging New England Mayor is defeated in a hard-fought re-election campaign involving shady transactions by both political groups.

programme.title: Harriet Craig
programme.desc: Harriet Craig runs a household with an iron fist, manipulating others in order to keep her place perfect, no matter the cost.

programme.title: Too Many Husbands
programme.desc: An excellent romantic comedy starring Jean Arthur, who is married to Melvyn Douglas. When her first husband (Fred MacMurray), thought dead, shows up, he turns her world upside down. Comic tensions flare when both husbands vie for Arthur's affections. The two men finally become fed up with Arthur's love for attention--they leave and become friends.

programme.title: The Mouse That Roared
programme.desc: An outlandish, sidesplitting tale of the fortunes of the Duchy of Grand Fenwick.

programme.title: The Magic Carpet
programme.desc: Arabian Nights-type of tale stars Agar as a deposed prince trying to free his people from the evil rule of the caliph, the princess Narah (Lucille Ball) and his vizier, played by Burr. Agar enlists the aid of harem girl Patricia Medina and together they win back the province, while zipping around on a flying carpet.

programme.title: The Family Jewels
programme.desc: When a poor little rich girl is suddenly orphaned, one of her six wacky uncles – all played by Jerry Lewis – will be selected as her guardian.

programme.title: Artists and Models
programme.desc: A goonish young man receives telepathic top secret information in his nightmares, which are used by his artist friend in comic strips. Foreign agents and the CIA get interested.

programme.title: In Harms Way
programme.desc: Producer-director Otto Preminger's epic treatment of the bombing of Pearl Harbor details the devastating attack on the Hawaiian naval base as well as the explosive, behind-the-scenes stories.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: RT Essentials
programme.desc: A historical look back at 1930s cinema featuring Rebecca, Casablanca, All the King's Men, and more!

programme.title: A Monster Calls
programme.desc: A boy imagines a monster that helps him deal with his difficult life and see the world in a different way.

programme.title: Road to Zanzibar
programme.desc: The crazy Yanks are back and barnstorm their way through Africa trying to raise funds to get back to the U.S.

programme.title: The Palm Beach Story
programme.desc: Money makes the world go 'round, or so Gerry believes when she divorces her husband and marries a millionaire.

programme.title: Christmas on Holly Lane
programme.desc: Life-long best friends Sarah, Cat and Riley reunite in Sarah's childhood home to cook up some Christmas magic and save the holidays for their families. With each friend at a different crossroad, they will all have to come together to rediscover the Christmas magic that can only happen in the house on Holly Lane.

programme.title: Holiday Baggage
programme.desc: Respectively a pediatrician and soon to be retired commercial pilot, Sarah and Pete Murphy, who have two grown daughters Lisa and Holly, have been legally separated for ten years. They lead different lives, Pete who lives hard, cavorts around the world and did cheat on Sarah when they were together, while Sarah is more focused on family. Since the separation which the girls mistakenly believe is a full divorce, Pete has been out of his family's life, he who has made little effort to keep in touch, while Lisa in particular has purposefully excluded her father from her life, including not inviting him to her wedding to longtime fiancé and family friend/neighbor Andrew Priester, and not having told him that they are having a baby. Sarah has not condoned Lisa's attitude, but also has done nothing to try and change it. Just prior to Thanksgiving, Pete is forced to return to Chicago to meet with Sarah when he makes the decision to remarry, to a woman named Kelly, who is young enough to be his daughter and with who he is moving permanently to the Bahamas, and thus requires Sarah to sign the final divorce papers. He expects solely to be in Chicago long enough to see Sarah and the girls to tell them the news and to invite them to the wedding. Out of circumstance, Pete is forced to stay in Chicago longer than he anticipated. In finding out about all that has and is going on in Sarah and the girls' lives, Pete may take stock of his relationships with them and if time will have healed all wounds in their family.

programme.title: Falling for Christmas
programme.desc: When champion figure skater Claire becomes injured she is sent to a rehabilitation center in the snowy mountains where she meets and falls for a local ice fisherman who shows her there is more to life than competition.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young woman who comes from a life of privilege falls for the owner of a soup kitchen after discovering a Dear Santa letter written by his seven year old daughter.

programme.title: The Merry In-laws
programme.desc: After Alex gets engaged to Peter, she goes to meet his parents for the first time, not knowing they are actually Santa and Mrs. Claus.

programme.title: You, Me, and that Mountain Retreat
programme.desc: Partnered with nature-hating Nathan, Rebecca is put to the test during a work mountain retreat.

programme.title: What We Do For Love
programme.desc: Sophie secures a job at the famous wellness firm but soon clashes with the chief life coach Jason.

programme.title: Courage
programme.desc: Jason Priestley stars in this inspirational adventure story about courage, love and the power of family.

programme.title: A Mile In His Shoes
programme.desc: Baseball coach Murph needs a miracle to save the team. Pitcher Micky with Aspergers may be the answer.

programme.title: WWJD? The Journey Continues
programme.desc: WWJD continues as the drifter arrives into a new town , inspiring a group of people to live as Jesus would.

programme.title: The Ultimate Gift
programme.desc: A deceased billionaire leaves his spoiled adult grandson a series of odd tasks to perform in order to receive the ultimate gift, with the resentful grandson having no idea what that might be.

programme.title: Santa Trap
programme.desc: Santa Claus (Dick Van Patten) winds up in jail after a 7-year-old sets a trap in order to prove his existence to her family (Robert Hays, Shelley Long).

programme.title: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: A loan shark (Ross Kemp) sees his past, present and future after the spirit of his former partner visits him on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: A Dog Named Christmas
programme.desc: A Hallmark Hall of Fame original movie. A developmentally challenged young man sets out to convince his family & their rural community to participate in a local shelter's inaugural "Adopt a Dog for Christmas Program."

programme.title: For Horowitz
programme.desc: Failed pianist Ji-soo discovers a gifted boy and becomes his teacher and guardian for a piano competition.

programme.title: Your Name Is Rose (Parasite's Woo-Shik Choi)
programme.desc: Jang-Mi, a single mother who dreamt to be an idol in the past, runs into her past relationships.

programme.title: Joint Security Area
programme.desc: One day, a border guard is killed by a rifle bullet in the demilitarized zone between North and South Korea.

programme.title: Proof Of Innocence
programme.desc: A former cop receives a letter from a prisoner on death row. He reluctantly takes on the case when he learns that it is linked with his ex-rival.

programme.title: The Kissing Bandit
programme.desc: After some bedroom issues, Dale Saunders, get kicked to the curb by his wife. One stormy night to his delight, a gorgeous redhead in distress shows up at his new pad and rekindles his lost lust. While she promises to fulfill his secret sexual fantasy, she prowls at night making the same promise to other men she seduces and rips-off with the help of an accomplice. When the media warns the public, Atlanta is swept with Kissing Bandit fever.

programme.title: The Legend of Glynn Turman
programme.desc: The life story and career of legendary actor Glynn Turman. At 12 years old he made his Broadway debut in the classic and original production of "A Raisin in the Sun" opposite all-time great, Sidney Poitier. For the last 6 decades he has graced the silver screen, television, and stage with performances of brilliance and excellence. The film chronicles his childhood, born in New York to his journey to Hollywood, becoming one of the world's best actors.

programme.title: The Love App
programme.desc: Rachel is a promising young woman getting over a recent breakup while her friend signs her up for a dating app unbeknownst to her. She is presented three blind dates to choose from. Little does she know, one of them is a serial killer.

programme.title: The Love We Had
programme.desc: One decision results in a tragedy that threatens to rip a young couple apart at the seams while essentially destroying everything and everyone who means the most to them.

programme.title: Shark Lake
programme.desc: Action legend Dolph Lundgren goes head to head with a bloodthirsty shark that has a resort town under siege.

programme.title: Blue Demon
programme.desc: When a top-secret government project is sabotaged, mutant great white sharks are released into American waterways.

programme.title: Shark Season
programme.desc: A great white shark relentlessly stalks three kayakers out on a remote island. As they wait for help to arrive, the tide starts to rise, forcing them back into the deadly waters.

programme.title: Raging Sharks
programme.desc: After debris from an alien spaceship lands in the sea, great white sharks begin terrorizing marine scientists.

programme.title: Icetastrophe
programme.desc: A piece of a meteor strikes the center of a small mountain town and causes deadly freezing temperatures.

programme.title: Spiders 3D
programme.desc: A space shuttle crashes into a New York City subway tunnel, releasing a bloodthirsty army of mutated spiders.

programme.title: 500 MPH Storm
programme.desc: When an experiment goes haywire, a rash of massive hurricanes rips across North America. A high school science teacher must get his family to safety before the hurricanes merge, creating a "hypercane" with the power to wipe the U.S. off the map.

programme.title: 51st State
programme.desc: "The 51st State" is the story of Elmo McElroy (Samuel L. Jackson), a streetwise American master chemist, who heads to England to set up his last big deal -- to introduce a new designer drug to the European market. McElroy soon becomes embroiled in a web of double-dealing as he's escorted around Liverpool's underworld and rave scene by rabid local hood Felix De Souza (Robert Carlyle), who hates all things American.

programme.title: Eurythmics
programme.desc: Annie Lennox and Dave Stewart came from very different backgrounds, but both pursued a career in music from an early age. Annie Lennox and Dave Stewart were two wildly different characters. She was a tenement girl from Aberdeen, who'd managed to claw her way out of what was obviously quite a hard upbringing, He was the kind of Wearside Durham Jack the Lad who was something of a musical prodigy. Annie studied the flute at the Royal Academy of Music but had to work as a waitress to get by. It was at her workplace that she was introduced to Dave Stewart through a mutual friend. They would soon form their first band, The Tourists The Tourists disbanded after legal issues between Pete Coombes and the label. It freed Annie and Dave, who wanted to expand their creativity further. Together they formed the Eurythmics and released their debut album, In the Garden. In the Garden achieved little commercial success and the duo chose to retreat to a small home studio in London's Chalk Farm, where they were free to develop a new sound They began to work with synthesisers, a choice that would lead them to their breakthrough hit, Sweet Dreams Are Made Of This. The success of the single led to a re-release of Love is a Stranger. The band, now big on both sides of the Atlantic, had another hit on their hands. The band quickly worked on their follow-up album, Touch. It would become their first number one in the UK and produced a succession of hit singles. Touch also saw them experiment with even more musical styles Featuring archive material, music videos Who's That Girl, Sweet Dreams (Are Made Of This) and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists Michael Bonner (Uncut Magazine), Hamish MacBain (Shortlist), John Aizlewood (Evening Standard) Rock Legends Eurythmics tells the story of one of Britain's enduring rock bands.

programme.title: Bryan Ferry
programme.desc: Bryan Ferry was born into a northern working-class family as the Second World War came to a close. His father handled pit ponies for the surrounding coal mines. Whilst studying fine art at Newcastle University, Ferry became exposed to the R&B, jazz and soul records that came in via the city's shipping ports. Ferry moved to London's Notting Hill at the start of the 1970s. It was here that he would quickly form his band, Roxy Music. He had such a strong vision for the band that before signing to Island Records he had the band's debut album and artwork completed. The first single, Virginia Plain was so remarkable in its maturity it entered the UK charts at number four .

programme.title: Avril Lavigne
programme.desc: The Canadian Avril Lavigne enchanted the public in 2007 at her show in Calgary (Canada), in which she released the album “The Best Damn Thing”, which sold, that same year, more than 6 million copies worldwide. The pop singer rocked the audience to the sound of “Girlfriend” as well as other great hits like “Complicated” and “I'm With You”. programme.title: Black Sabbath
programme.desc: Birmingham in the late 1960s was an industrial city, packed with music groups. At its height, the New Musical Express had reported 500 on its bustling circuit and from two of these groups, Black Sabbath was formed. The Beatles would be a key influence for Ozzy, but bassist Geezer Butler also shaped Ozzy's work, through his lyrics After signing to Vertigo Records in 1970, the four piece used their distinctive sound to full effect for their self-titled debut album, Black Sabbath. Black Sabbath became a commercial success, entering the UK top 10 and the US charts. In it's first year it sold one million copies. Keen to build on the success, the band entered the studio just four months after releasing their debut. The title track, Paranoid, would lead the new album. Featuring archive material, music videos “PARANOID” “EVIL WOMAN” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6)

programme.title: Iron Maiden
programme.desc: With sales near the 90 million mark and a career spanning over four decades, Iron Maiden are giants of the metal scene. The band grew out of London's East End in the early 70s when bassist Steve Harris tried to find the right musicians to suit his ambitious musical ideas. ‘The Number of the Beast' made Iron Maiden global superstars.To date it has sold 14 million copies. Iron Maiden continue to be one of the world's biggest metal acts. Their 2010 release, ‘The Final Frontier' entered at Number one in 28 countries. Featuring archive material, music videos – “RUNNING FREE” “RUN TO THE HILLS” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6)

programme.title: Vino el amor: Fuera del viñedo

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Manuel le dice a Matilde que piensa que Rosario podría ser su madre y le pregunta si le asustaría la idea ella responde que si Rosario fuera su madre, el padre Urbano se lo habría dicho. Catalina le dice a doña Juana que quiere casarse con Adolfo.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Más pronto de lo que esperas
programme.desc: Santa le dice a Maricruz que la mamá de Solita ha regresado y la está buscando Simona pierde el control y saca a su hijo de la cuna diciendo que se deshará de él.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Locura

programme.title: Teresa: Duras decisiones
programme.desc: Teresa no piensa perder más su tiempo y está decidida a divorciarse de Arturo si él no deja de desconfiar de ella. Juana le confiesa a Teresa el gran amor que siente por Cutberto.

programme.title: Rubí: Traición
programme.desc: Rubí y Héctor se besan, él confundido evita a Maribel Alejandro queda a cargo de un proyecto importante en el hospital Héctor busca a Rubí para platicar y ella le hace creer que lo quiere y deben de alejarse porque no quiere hacerle daño a Maribel.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Despedida
programme.desc: Eva entristece al saber que Rosario ha muerto. Sarita y Franco se confiesan el inmenso amor que sienten el uno por el otro. Fernando decide cerrar la cantina para no levantar sospechas de la muerte de Rosario.

programme.desc: Amador está de regreso para vengarse de Marichuy. Juan Miguel visita a Ana Julia para saber la verdad sobre Daniel y Marichuy. Amador y Juan Miguel tienen un enfrentamiento. Juan Miguel dice a Patricio que él operará a Marichuy.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Ana Julia le confiesa a Amador el odio que siente hacia Marichuy, él aprovecha la oportunidad y le pide que cooperen para vengarse de ella. Ana Julia se confiesa con el padre Anselmo pero luego se arrepiente y continúa con su malvado plan.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: Victoria le dice a Osvaldo que por su culpa todos saben de su vidas privada, él le dice que si ya no quiere estar con él lo mejor es que se divorcien Victoria regaña a María por cambiar su imagen.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: Fernanda le platica a su familia sobre los preparativos de su fiesta de cumpleaños. Max y Osvaldo le preguntan a Victoria por qué despidió a María, Victoria le responde que María se presentó vestida de una forma vulgar y por eso tomó esa decisión.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: Victoria regresa a casa de María para convencerla de que vuelva a la casa de modas, pero ella está decidida y le dice que no. Osvaldo recibe la noticia de que los inversionistas decidieron quitarle el patrocinio y no hará la miniserie.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: Max le cuenta a María que Victoria no es su verdadera madre, pero ella no le cree. Osvaldo le dice a Victoria que le va a regalar un reloj de oro a Fer porque es muy irresponsable y no le dará un coche.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Juan Miguel consigue su primer éxito en las cirugías. Amador quiere recuperarse para vengarse. Marichuy le asegura a Rocío que ya no ama a Juan Miguel. Ana Julia envía fotos a Juan Miguel para hacerle creer que Marichuy está enamorada de su primo.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Terrible discusión
programme.desc: Antonio le dice a Victoria que no le dejará la empresa a Bruno, pues no es un hombre responsable. En medio de una discusión con Bruno, Antonio sufre un accidente.

programme.title: La desalmada: La tragedia
programme.desc: Carmelo amenaza a Santiago para que firme la venta de sus tierras. Isabella llega a la Ciudad de México en compañía de sus padres, y se reencuentra con Rafael y David. Santiago y Fernanda celebran su boda, pero sufren una tragedia.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Florencia enamorada
programme.desc: Damián teme que Gael lo quiera matar por haber impedido su boda. Florencia le confiesa a Enrique sus mentiras y engaños.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: La muerte de la nana
programme.desc: Ivana huye de la hacienda después de empujar a Benita por el balcón. Iluminada va a la fiesta de Felipe y Sandra para decirle a José Miguel del accidente de Benita. Leonor le reclama a José Miguel por ver a Valentina.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Doble asesinato
programme.desc: Leonardo es un policía que planea casarse con Julia. Elisa vive un momento de felicidad cuando su padre, Augusto, le regala una galería de arte. El destino de ambos se cruza cuando Augusto y Julia aparecen muertos en el mismo vehículo.

programme.title: La usurpadora: El inicio de la farsa
programme.desc: Paula, antes de morir, le escribe una carta a Paulina revelándole que Paola es su hermana. Paola le propone a Paulina hacerse pasar por ella por un año a cambio de dinero y, para presionarla, decide acusarla de robo.

programme.title: La Gata: Disculpas sinceras
programme.desc: La Jarocha le cuenta a Rita que su hijo escapó de la cárcel. Por otro lado, Esmeralda le pide perdón a Pablo por culparlo por las cosas que hace su mamá.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Plácido no logra conseguir trabajo y tiene tres meses de renta atrasados. Martina piensa cómo conseguir dinero para pagar la escuela. Plácido se disfraza de pordiosero para conseguir dinero el dinero de la renta.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Don Justo le ofrece a Plácido regresar a trabajar bajo una condición que a él, no le parece. Por falta de pago, a los López les cortan el teléfono, el gas y la luz. Gaby y Plutarco le dan una noticia a Plácido.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: María de Todos los Ángeles es una mujer que siente que se está haciendo vieja sin haber encontrado el amor de su vida. Ella tiene un sueño en el que los ángeles anuncian que pronto el amor de su vida va a llegar.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: María decide provocar un encuentro con Albertano para verlo directamente a los ojos y descubrir si es el amor de su vida. La vida de Albertano corre peligro y María se arriesga para salvarlo.

programme.desc: Una vecina le entrega a Ludovico unos cachorros, pues cree que son hijos de su perro. Ludovico le ordena a Ludoviquito que venda a los perritos. Junior recupera la memoria y cree que ha sido secuestrado por una peligrosa banda.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Excelsa le pide a Federica que le preste a su familia pues sus padres la visitarán y ellos creen que tiene un esposo millonario. La madre de Excelsa cree que Ludovico la engaña.

programme.title: 40 y 20

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mia no perdona a Franco por mentirle toda su vida sobre el presunto fallecimiento de su madre. Miguel no acepta hacer la rehabilitación y Franco habla con él. Javier es inculpado en el robo de tangas y calzones a las alumnas de Elite Way.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Gandía le confiesa la verdad a Madariaga sobre las amenazas de León para que aceptara entrar en sus negocios Mia quiere localizar a su mamá, pero Franco le dice que desapareció de nuevo Miguel le pregunta a Diego y Roberta si Mia era su novia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mia pone un anuncio en el periódico para localizar a su mamá Pascual se niega a desafiar a León por no perder su empleo León manda a secuestrar a Diego para utilizarlo como un golpe publicitario para su campaña Mia y Marina se encuentran.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta termina su noviazgo con Diego por aceptar los chantajes de León. Marina le explica a Mía por qué se fue. Gandía se niega a renunciar al colegio. Mía planea irse a vivir con su mamá.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mia le pide permiso a Franco para irse a vivir con Marina, si las cosas salen bien. Sol, bajo el nombre de Vico, le informa a la mamá de Celina que su hija está embarazada. Celina le dice a su mamá que se va a casar con Max.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Franco le ofrece la patria potestad de Mia a Marina. Giovanni se hace pasar por gay para engañar al papá de Javier. Roberta acepta a Colucci como la pareja de su mamá. Miguel busca hablar con Mia para reconciliarse.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Corazón salvaje

programme.title: Corazón salvaje

programme.title: Corazón salvaje

programme.title: What's For Sale? With A View
programme.sub-title: Island archipelago / Island retreat (Salt Spring island)
programme.desc: Katherine and Aaron dream of an oasis with incredible views of dotted islands and serene waters. A warm and welcoming place for their family and friends on the Pacific shores of Canada.

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Jennifer and Matt see Real Potential
programme.desc: Even though they realize they need more space for their growing family, Jennifer and Matt are having a hard time thinking about leaving the home they love. Every house they've seen pales by comparison. Sarah shows them the potential of three homes, and tries to break this couple of their brick and mortar love affair. Once Jennifer and Matt buy, Sarah renovates the one room they can't stand, igniting their passion for their new home!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Ayesha and Michael see Real Potential
programme.desc: Talk about obsessed! Ayesha and Michael stalked the very houses they were interested in, never ever signing on the dotted line. Sarah opens this young, fun couple to the potential of three homes, balancing their separate wants and wish lists. Once Ayesha and Michael buy, Sarah targets and renovates one room in their new home to payback all the late night stalking and indecision!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Ameera and Ethan see Real Potential
programme.desc: Ameera and Ethan are getting married in a few weeks, and are each moving away from home for the first time! Sarah lends her expertise to these house-buying newbies, showing them the potential of three homes that focus on features and amenities that target their age group. Once Ameera and Ethan buy, Sarah renovates the one room in their new home that takes it over the threshold to terrific!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Janice and Colin see Real Potential
programme.desc: For Janice the suburban dream is about space and great schools, while for husband Colin it's all about his car collection. Sarah shows them the potential of three houses, each sprawling with the room they need, plus character, good school district and big driveways. Once Janice and Colin buy, Sarah renovates the one room in their home that lifts the one space that's critical to their family enjoyment!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Ann and Theo see Real Potential
programme.desc: Ann's never lived anywhere but Theo's bachelor pad. Two kids later and it's about time they find something that's theirs. And, they need to go bigger than they've got now. Sarah shows them the potential in three houses that suit their growing family's needs. Once Ann and Theo buy, Sarah renovates the one space they doubted, but now immediately welcomes them to their new home.

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Caroline and Josh see Real Potential
programme.desc: The very pregnant Caroline and Josh need out of his parents' house, where they're bunking to save money. Sarah shows them the potential of three houses, in which they can build a family. And it must happen asap as Caroline's due in a month! Once Caroline and Josh buy, Sarah renovates the one room that stands out as b-a-d. Baby arrives just as Sarah and crew bring this room to the finish line!

programme.title: Blank Slate
programme.sub-title: This Luxurious Bedroom Was Inspired by the Lush Texas Landscape
programme.desc: Virginia Toledo and Jessica Geller, at Toledo Geller in Franklin Lakes, New Jersey, designed the intimate main bedroom and connected bath in our home as a total celebration of that landscape.

programme.title: Blank Slate
programme.sub-title: This Texas Kitchen Proves You Don't Need An Island
programme.desc: There's no better place to vent, celebrate, or simply catch up about the events of the day than near snacks. Stephanie Sabbe of Sabbe Interior Design in Nashville designs the kitchen, dirty kitchen, and utility room in our home.

programme.title: Blank Slate
programme.sub-title: This Home Office Doubles As a Workout Room
programme.desc: In creating a productivity-inspiring home office for our home, Baltimore-based designer Laura Hodges of Laura Hodges Studio decided to make it double as a no-pressure workout room.

programme.title: Blank Slate
programme.sub-title: How To Transform Your Patio Into an Outdoor Entertaining Space
programme.desc: Los Angeles designer Linda Hayslett of LH.Designs designed around the pool at our home—a necessity in scorching hot Texas. The outdoor area feaures a fireplace, some youthful (but adult-friendly) swings, and more.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Kristine and Terry needed more living space for their expanding family. They decided to add a second story addition over the garage in order to add a bedroom and bathroom. When the contractor demanded full payment before the job was completed, the homeowners refused to pay. The contractor placed a Lien on their home stating that the renovation was 99 percent complete. Mike and the team finish the job and demonstrate just how incomplete the job really was.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: When a fencing contractor rips off a new housing development by taking a deposit from 52 families and working just long enough to cash the cheques before disappearing, Mike and the crew take on the challenge of not just helping one homeowner, but the entire neighborhood! Ultimately, Mike builds more than a fence he also brings this new community together with a common purpose- and makes things right.

programme.title: Chefs A'Field: Kids On The Farm
programme.sub-title: Walnut Shaking: Chef Michael Mina, Sacramento Valley & San Francisco
programme.desc: Walnut Shaking: Chef Michael Mina, Sacramento Valley & San Francisco. Michael Mina is considered, by many, to be one of the world's best chefs. In this episode, Chef Mina and his two sons, Sammy, age 8, and Anthony, age 4, head to the Sacramento Valley, where the walnut trees are in season and ready for the picking. But picking isn't exactly how they harvest a tree exploding with nuts.

programme.title: Chefs A'Field: Kids On The Farm

programme.desc: Rockfish Round-Up: Chef Robert Wiedmaier , Chesapeake Bay & Washington, D.C. As they catch and release the stripe bass, marine biologist Jim Chambers is on hand to explain the Bbay's ecosystem.

programme.title: Chefs A'Field: Kids On The Farm
programme.sub-title: California Strawberries: Chefs Mitch & Steve Rosenthal, San Francisco
programme.desc: California Strawberries: Chefs Mitch & Steve Rosenthal, San Francisco. programme.title: Chefs A'Field: Kids On The Farm
programme.sub-title: Artisan Chevre: Chef Bruce Sherman, Chicago, IL.
programme.desc: Artisan Chevre: Chef Bruce Sherman, Chicago, IL. In this episode, the chef and his two daughters get a quick lesson in goat psychology as well as milking and the art of cheese making.
